goals: Explore Federal Reserve interest rate predictions from Kalshi to understand borrowing cost outlook for small businesses
Get economics prediction markets from Kalshi (GDP, CPI, inflation) to assess broader economic conditions
Compare economic prediction markets across Polymarket and Kalshi to find consensus or discrepancies
Analyze how Fed rate and economic predictions may impact small business risk and lending conditions

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and data-driven, focused on quantifying and mitigating risks for small business clients. Prefers concrete probabilities and actionable insights.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know specific tool names or APIs; asks for economic predictions and market analysis in natural language. Understands prediction markets conceptually but relies on assistant to fetch data.

end_condition: User has obtained Fed rate predictions, economic indicators, and analysis connecting these to small business risk. Expresses satisfaction or asks no further clarifying questions about economic outlook for small business planning.
